---
title: "Calculating L-function (weighted)"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
.libPaths("/enna/nobackup/biostat/Rpackages/v4/")
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(spicyR)
  library(SpatialDatasets)
  library(tidyverse)
  library(tidySingleCellExperiment)
  library(scClassify)
  library(caret) 
  library(spatstat.geom)
  library(data.table)
  library(Statial)
  library(BiocParallel)
  library(lme4)
  library(lmerTest)
})
```


```{r}
load(".RData")
```
